AtomsBot is LLM-friendly:
- Clear, test-defined behavior for commands (assign, label, status, link)
- Modular GitHub/Jira actions via helpers (githubActions, jiraClient)
- Auto-linker provides deterministic context resolution
- Webhooks provide an event-driven backbone

When integrating with agent CLIs (Cursor, auggie, codex/code), follow these:
1) Drive development via tests in src/**/__tests__
2) Respect Discord interaction patterns (defer + edit)
3) Centralize repo resolution with getRepoCredentialsForThread
4) Mock external clients in tests/setup.ts
5) Document changes in docs/* and update coverage if needed
